title: Slack Emoji AI Search
name: slack-emoji-ai-search
description: Semantically search a local Slack emoji collection using AI and copy the name to your clipboard.
author: thz

commands.name: index
commands.title: Search Slack Emojis with AI
commands.description: Semantically search for Slack emojis using AI.

preferences.name: emojiSource
preferences.title: Emoji Source
preferences.description: Where to load emojis from — a local directory or a public GitHub repository

preferences.name: emojiDirectory
preferences.title: Emoji Directory
preferences.description: Path to local emoji directory containing emojis/emojis.json and emojis/aliases.json (required when Emoji Source is "Local directory")

preferences.name: githubEmojiRepo
preferences.title: GitHub Emoji Repository
preferences.description: Public GitHub repository with your emoji collection in owner/repo format, e.g. myorg/slack-emojis (required when Emoji Source is "GitHub repository")

preferences.name: githubEmojiBranch
preferences.title: GitHub Emoji Branch
preferences.description: Branch of the GitHub emoji repository to use (defaults to main)

preferences.name: githubToken
preferences.title: GitHub Personal Access Token
preferences.description: PAT with models:read scope for AI-powered search via GitHub Models

preferences.name: ignoreList
preferences.title: Ignore List
preferences.description: Comma-separated list of emoji name prefixes to exclude from results (e.g. ofub, someprefix)

preferences.name: aiModel
preferences.title: AI Model
preferences.description: GitHub Models model to use for emoji candidate generation
